title: AI gold rush upends San Francisco housing market
description: In San Francisco, the longtime hub of the US tech sector, fortunes tied to artificial intelligence startups are inflating home prices and fueling a spike in evictions, splitting the city's population into two different trajectories. Whether the home could be bought with shares remains to be seen, but the frenzy around it sparked a larger conversation about San Francisco housing.

description: Alphabet's Google is in talks with Samsung Electronics to manufacture part of its next-generation artificial intelligence processor, The Information reported on Thursday, citing two people familiar with ​the matter.

title: A home that washes, cools and thinks for you: Inside LG's 'Zero Labor Home' vision for India
description: LG Electronics is building a future home powered by artificial intelligence. Intelligent appliances, connected platforms, and robots will work together to automate chores. This "Zero Labor Home" vision aims for ultimate convenience. India is a key market for these advanced AI-driven living solutions. LG's manufacturing facilities are aligning with this global AI roadmap.

description: LSEG shares tumbled nearly 13% in one day in February as worries about the threat posed by large language artificial intelligence models like Anthropic's Claude triggered a sharp selloff in software stocks.

title: Weis Markets rolls out Instacart's AI-powered caper carts to reinvent in-store shopping
description: Weis Markets has partnered with Instacart to launch AI-powered Caper Carts, bringing smart shopping cart technology to select grocery stores. Featuring computer vision, digital coupons, loyalty rewards and real-time spending updates, the initiative highlights how artificial intelligence in retail is reshaping the in-store shopping experience and driving the next phase of retail innovation.

description: As artificial intelligence reshapes the technology landscape, a new acronym called MANGOS is gaining traction as the potential successor to FAANG among investors, developers, and tech enthusiasts.
